summary: Fixed and tested data input and date handling system in KitaTracker. The input focus loss bug was caused by Radix Select components switching between controlled/uncontrolled states. Fixed by using conditional value binding. All 15 tests passed.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Income form - Date field defaults to today's date (2026-03-31 in YYYY-MM-DD format)
Income form - Day field auto-updates when date changes (e.g., April 15, 2026 = Wednesday)
Income form - Product Name input works without losing focus (character by character typing)
Income form - Customer Name input works without losing focus
Income form - Reference Number input works
Income form - Month filter changes and shows correct data
Expense form - Date field defaults to today's date
Expense form - Day field auto-updates when date changes (April 20, 2026 = Monday)
Expense form - Description input works without losing focus
Expense form - Category input works without losing focus
Expense form - Amount, Notes, Reference inputs work
Dashboard - Month selector works and shows correct data for selected month
Dashboard - February 2026 shows ₱400.00 income (2 transactions), March 2026 shows ₱0.00
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Select components were switching between controlled/uncontrolled states due to `value={formData.field || undefined}` pattern
FIX APPLIED: Changed to `value={suggestions.includes(formData.field) ? formData.field : undefined}` to keep Select uncontrolled when value is not in options list
The useCallback hooks for handleInputChange and handleSelectChange are correctly implemented to prevent re-renders
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Input focus loss bug is FIXED. The root cause was Radix Select components with `value={field || undefined}` switching between controlled/uncontrolled states on every keystroke. Fixed by checking if the value exists in the suggestions array before passing it to Select. Date handling is working correctly - getTodayDate() returns local date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

month_filter.income_page_filter: PASS - Shows correct data for selected month
month_filter.dashboard_filter: PASS - Shows correct totals for selected month

bug_fix_details.root_cause: Radix Select components with value={formData.product_name || undefined} were switching between controlled (when value exists) and uncontrolled (when value is empty string) states. This caused React to re-render the component tree on every keystroke, losing input focus.
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed Select value binding to only pass the value when it exists in the suggestions array: value={suggestions.products.includes(formData.product_name) ? formData.product_name : undefined}. This keeps the Select consistently uncontrolled when typing new values.
